mission.title: atlantis: Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets
mission.description: Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets. Requested by 26+ users.

steps.title: Check current atlantis deployment
steps.description:
Verify your atlantis version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
helm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working atlantis installation.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
### Community Note

- Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets
steps.description:
## what

Added support for Bitbucket Cloud Webhook secrets. Bitbucket added support in the cloud offering in October of 2023 [Announcement](https://bitbucket.org/blog/enhanced-webhook-security)

* Ported the request validation libraries from bitbucket server to bitbucket cloud client.
* Removed error check and associated test to ensure they aren't being used because they weren't supported

## why

There is an open request for this #3909 and I'm also in need of this feature.

## tests

I ran

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## what

Added support for Bitbucket Cloud Webhook secrets. Bitbucket added support in the cloud offering in October of 2023 [Announcement](https://bitbucket.org/blog/enhanced-webhook-security)

* Ported the request validation libraries from bitbucket server to bitbucket cloud client.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
